anti_patterns.title: Product visual cannot teach the workflow
anti_patterns.do_not: Use an opaque, tiny, or obscured product screenshot where the buyer needs to understand the workflow.

good_bad.good: A readable product state shows the before-and-after workflow in context.
good_bad.bad: A blurred dashboard floating behind marketing copy.

anti_patterns.title: Glossy blob substitutes for product evidence
anti_patterns.do_not: Use blurred glossy decoration in place of a real product state or workflow demonstration.

anti_patterns.title: Feature grid does not form a product narrative
anti_patterns.do_not: Present disconnected feature cards when they do not explain a coherent product workflow.
